title: Ill Help You Build a Million Dollar SaaS Business

segments.text: B2B SAS is the best business model in
the world. Most founders think they need
the Silicon Valley playbook. Raise
venture capital, burn through cash, grow
at all costs, and hope for an exit
before you run out of runway. But
there's a better way. It's to build
profitably, scale sustainably, and keep
control of your company and your future.
I'm Rob Walling, and I've built six
companies, had two exits, written five
books, and invested in hundreds of
startups. Over the last two decades,
I've worked directly with thousands of
founders at every stage of the journey,
and I'm on a mission to multiply the
number of independent self-sustaining
software startups in the world. In 2011,
I co-founded MicroCom, the original
community for bootstrapped and mostly
bootstrap founders. We've hosted more
than 45 in-person and remote events that
bring together SAS founders from around
the world. This channel started as
micro, but now we're expanding to cover
everything I work on. insights from my
books, my podcast startups for the rest
of us, and from Tiny Seed, where we've
invested in and coached hundreds of B2B
SAS founders through our early stage
accelerator and our growth programs for
7 figure plus companies. All of these
touch points with thousands of founders
give me realtime insights into what's
actually working today. Not just theory,
but proven tactics from the trenches. On
this channel, I go deep on the
strategies you need for every stage.
things like finding a profitable SAS
idea and landing your first customers.
Then building a sales engine to reach
hundreds or thousands more, managing
your first hire and building a lean,
high performing team, scaling from 1,000
to 10,000 to 100,000 to a million in MR
and eventually navigating the path to
exit. Because the goal isn't just to
launch a startup, it's to stay sane
while you build a life-changing business
that gives you freedom, optionality, and
control over your future. Whether you're
at day 1 or year 10, make sure you hit
subscribe to get notified when I launch
new videos. If you're just getting
started and you're trying to find a
profitable SAS idea, you should watch
this video next. And if you're later
stage and looking to scale, check out
this video. Thanks for watching. I'll
see you next time.
